channel.title: Reconnaissance on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Reconnaissance on TLDRBins

item.title: DNS Enum
item.description: Zone Transfer dig test.com axfr @10.10.11.10 Domain Discovery dig @10.10.11.10 test.com dig @10.10.11.10 -x 10.10.11.10 dig @10.10.11.10 -x 10.10.11.10 dig @10.10.11.10 +short test.com any dig @10.10.11.10 -t NS test.com dig @10.10.11.10 _gc.test.com

item.title: Drupal
item.description: droopescan Download droopescan droopescan scan drupal -u http://10.10.11.10 Note: This can take a long time to run

item.title: Network Discovery
item.description: Test Connectivity ping -c3 10.10.11.10 Test Reverse Connectivity sudo tcpdump -ni tun0 icmp Use ping to Scan Subnet for i in $(seq 1 254); do (ping -c 1 10.100.10.${i} | grep "bytes from" &); done; Use nc to Scan Ports for i in $(seq 1 65535); do nc -zvn 127.0.0.1 ${i}; done Check ARP arp -na cat /proc/net/arp Check IP # Linux ifconfig # Windows ipconfig ip addr cat /proc/net/fib_trie Check Network Connections # TCP netstat -plant # UDP netstat -plunt # Windows netstat -ano

item.title: Nmap
item.description: Nmap Port Scan TCP Scan target=10.10.11.10 nmap -p- --min-rate 10000 -oA ./nmap-alltcp $target ports=$(cat nmap-alltcp.nmap| grep -Eo "^[0-9]+" | tr '\n' ',' | sed -r 's/,$//') nmap -p $ports -sCV -oA ./nmap-tcpscripts $target UDP Scan (common ports) target=10.10.11.10 nmap -sU --min-rate 10000 -oA ./nmap-udp $target ports=$(cat nmap-udp.nmap| grep -Eo "^[0-9]+" | tr '\n' ',' | sed -r 's/,$//') nmap -p $ports -sU -sCV -oA ./nmap-udpscripts $target Scan with nmap scripts Update scripts DB nmap --script-updatedb Search scripts nmap --script-help ftp* Scan with a script nmap --script=ftp-anon -sV -sC -p 21 10.

item.title: SMB Enum
item.description: SMB Share Enum Login without password smbmap smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 --no-banner smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -u null --no-banner # List known share smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -r 'share' smbclient smbclient -N -L \\\\10.10.11.10\\ #After found an accessible share smbclient -N \\\\10.10.11.10\\share\\ #After connection #List all files in a share recurse ON ls #Download all files mask "" recurse ON prompt OFF mget * # Fix: Unable to initialize messaging context. protocol negotiation failed: NT_STATUS_CONNECTION_DISCONNECTED smbclient -N -L \\\\10.

item.title: SNMP
item.description: onesixtyone Download onesixtyone # Brute force community string for snmpwalk use onesixtyone 10.10.11.10 -c /usr/share/doc/onesixtyone/dict.txt snmpwalk Installation sudo apt install snmp # Install Add-on for better result readability sudo apt install snmp-mibs-downloader # Comment out this line in /etc/snmp/snmp.conf # mibs : # Uncomment this line in /etc/snmp/snmp.conf mibdirs /usr/share/snmp/mibs:/usr/share/snmp/mibs/iana:/usr/share/snmp/mibs/ietf Basic Commands snmpwalk -v2c -c public 10.10.11.10 | tee snmpwalk_result # Query specific OID, e.g, ipAddressIfIndex.ipv6 snmpwalk -v2c -c public 10.
